since_last: 28% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads -0.12%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 28% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.16% · BTC -0.12% · Gold -0.75% · Nasdaq100 -1.05%. 28% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at -0.12%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.12%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.51%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: OKLO is the standout at -9.06%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +4.27%, INTU +3.15%, BIDU +2.80%, ISRG +2.76%, ZBRA +2.42%. Laggards: OKLO -9.06%, SMR -8.97%, SKHY -8.47%, CEVA -7.88%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.93% at $134.01
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.93% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
